gaps_union: Voting covenant to implement board composition: no clause requiring stockholders to vote their shares to elect the designated Founder, Series A, and independent directors as described
Registration rights: no clause providing demand, piggyback, or S-3 registration rights for investors seeking public resale of their shares
Investor competitive overlap disclosure: no clause requiring investors, particularly a strategic partner, to disclose holdings in companies that overlap with the Company’s business
Voting agreement to enforce board composition
Investor conflict or overlap disclosure obligations
Market stand-off / lock-up commitment for IPOs
Voting covenant to elect designated directors
